inputs.label: Attic Floor Area
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area of the attic space in square feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total floor area of the attic space in square feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatı katı alanının toplam taban alanı (ft² cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Superficie totale du grenier en pieds carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total del piso del ático en pies cuadrados.

inputs.label: Ventilation Ratio (1:X)
inputs.businessContext: Required total net free area expressed as 1 square foot per X square feet of attic area. Common values: 150 for standard construction, 300 with certain vapor barriers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Required total net free area expressed as 1 square foot per X square feet of attic area. Common values: 150 for standard construction, 300 with certain vapor barriers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerekli toplam net serbest alan, çatı katı alanının her X ft²'si için 1 ft² olarak ifade edilir. Yaygın değerler: standart yapı için 150, belirli buhar bariyerleri ile 300.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erforderliche gesamte Nettofreifläche, ausgedrückt als 1 Quadratfuß pro X Quadratfuß Dachbodenfläche. Übliche Werte: 150 für Standardbauweise, 300 bei bestimmten Dampfsperren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface nette libre totale requise exprimée en 1 pied carré par X pieds carrés de grenier. Valeurs courantes : 150 pour construction standard, 300 avec certains pare-vapeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área libre neta total requerida expresada como 1 pie cuadrado por cada X pies cuadrados de área de ático. Valores comunes: 150 para construcción estándar, 300 con ciertas barreras de vapor.

inputs.label: Ridge Vent NFA per Foot
inputs.businessContext: Net free area rating of the ridge vent product, in square inches per linear foot.

label_i18n.fr: NFA de l'évent de faîte par pied
label_i18n.es: NFA de ventilación de cumbrera por pie

businessContext_i18n.en: Net free area rating of the ridge vent product, in square inches per linear foot.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahya havalandırma ürününün net serbest alan değeri (in²/lineer ft cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewertung der Nettolüftungsfläche des Firstlüfters in Quadratzoll pro laufendem Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de surface nette libre du produit d'évent de faîte, en pouces carrés par pied linéaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación de área libre neta del producto de ventilación de cumbrera, en pulgadas cuadradas por pie lineal.

inputs.label: Exhaust Split Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of total ventilation area that should be provided by ridge exhaust. Typically 0.5 for balanced intake/exhaust.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of total ventilation area that should be provided by ridge exhaust. Typically 0.5 for balanced intake/exhaust.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahya egzozu tarafından sağlanması gereken toplam havalandırma alanının oranı. Dengeli giriş/egzoz için tipik olarak 0,5.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil der gesamten Lüftungsfläche, der durch Firstabluft bereitgestellt werden sollte. Typischerweise 0,5 für ausgewogene Zu-/Abluft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction de la surface de ventilation totale devant être fournie par l'extraction de faîte. Généralement 0,5 pour une entrée/sortie équilibrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción del área total de ventilación que debe ser proporcionada por la extracción de cumbrera. Típicamente 0.5 para entrada/extracción balanceada.

breakdown.label: Total Required NFA
breakdown.description: Total net free ventilation area required for the attic.

breakdown.label: Exhaust NFA
breakdown.description: Net free area needed at the ridge (exhaust).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
